title: adolphoduckea maynensis
side_effects: Adolphoduckea maynensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach cramps, which may be caused by excessive consumption of its toxic compounds. In severe cases, it can lead to respiratory failure, cardiac arrest, and even death. Additionally, prolonged exposure to its extracts may result in liver and kidney damage, as well as skin irritation and allergic reactions. If used in medicinal products without proper regulation, it may also interact with other medications, causing further complications and health risks.
